Fix round commit 7fccf6a: P2 fixed — third mini-report pushes a synthetic underscore value (drift_rating='somewhat_inconsistent'; the renderer doesn't validate vocabulary membership) through the drift cell alone (sigma/delta render 'consistent'/'on target' so the mapped needle can only come from the drift cell). Mutation-verified by the orchestrator: dropping _rating_label at the drift call site now FAILS the test; restored, 3/3 rating tests pass. Nit dispositioned dismissed (order-swap benign: map output introduces no HTML metacharacters, escaped entities contain no underscores). Delta scope: backend/tests/test_report_service.py only.
